title: Perempuan Bergaun Merah
overview: Since her best friend disappeared, Dinda's life turns into a nightmare when an evil spirit in the form of a woman in a red dress haunts her. Dinda's life is threatened, not only by the evil spirit but also by people who try to keep the events of the night of her best friend's disappearance a secret.
